subject: Need access to SharePoint site

email_body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for reaching out about SharePoint access. Your ticket (INC003) has been forwarded to our Identity & Access Team for review.

A specialist will contact you shortly to resolve the issue. No action is required on your end at this time.
